description: Coulson and Mack discover that Tess has been killed and left as a warning for protecting Flint. The reality of the Kree's brutality becomes painfully personal, and they resolve to protect Flint at any cost.

transcript.line: No. I can't be here anymore.
Hold on. It's too dangerous out there.
It's better than staring at the guy I just killed! I knew him! He was one of my best customers! Even gave me spare tokens from time to time.
What happened to Grill is not your fault.
You had no choice. He was gonna kill us. Now, Mack and I, we're gonna go find Tess, and we're gonna get you on a Trawler, okay?
Kid should be playing ball or running for student council.
Ah, served three terms. I'm a pretty financially responsible dude.
Tess. They killed her because she wouldn't give up Flint.
She's already dead. The only thing we can do now is try to keep Flint from meeting that same end. Come on.
